body:
## Problem

`soundLikeGuides.js` data module has **32 entries** but `api/sitemap.js` hardcodes only **29** in its local `soundLikeGuides` array. Three live `/guides/how-to-sound-like-<drummer>` pages (and their `/llms/guides/` LLM markdown counterparts) are absent from `sitemap.xml`.

**Confirmed missing (in data module, absent from `api/sitemap.js` lines 198–234):**
```
how-to-sound-like-daniel-erlandsson
how-to-sound-like-paul-bostaph
how-to-sound-like-hannes-grossmann
```

**Source of truth:** Running `node -e "import('./packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js').then(m => console.log(m.SOUND_LIKE_GUIDES.map(g => g.slug)))"` confirms 32 entries with the three above present.

## Root Cause

Same class of bug as #2330 (nick-menza/nicko-mcbrain/igor-cavalera) and #2409 (aquiles-priester/eloy-casagrande/charlie-benante). When the SoundLike data module gained entries from a batch PR, the sitemap hardcoded array was not updated.

## Fix

**File:** `api/sitemap.js`

**Option A (preferred):** Replace hardcoded `soundLikeGuides` array with a dynamic import:
```js
import { SOUND_LIKE_GUIDES } from '../packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js';
const soundLikeGuides = SOUND_LIKE_GUIDES.map(g => ({ slug: g.slug, name: g.title }));
```

**Option B (minimal):** Append the 3 missing entries after line 234 of the hardcoded array:
```js
// Batch N — Daniel Erlandsson, Paul Bostaph, Hannes Grossmann
{ slug: 'how-to-sound-like-daniel-erlandsson', name: 'How to Sound Like Daniel Erlandsson' },
{ slug: 'how-to-sound-like-paul-bostaph', name: 'How to Sound Like Paul Bostaph' },
{ slug: 'how-to-sound-like-hannes-grossmann', name: 'How to Sound Like Hannes Grossmann' },
```

Both the `/guides/` HTML URLs (line 495) and `/llms/guides/` LLM URLs (line 659) use the `soundLikeGuides` array, so both are fixed by one change.

## Impact

- 3 live guide pages + 3 LLM markdown files added to sitemap
- Daniel Erlandsson (Arch Enemy) = melodic death metal cluster anchor
- Paul Bostaph (Slayer) = links into the active Slayer article cluster
- Hannes Grossmann (Necrophagist) = technical death metal LLM citation surface

## Verify

1. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'daniel-erlandsson'` returns a `<loc>` entry
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'paul-bostaph'` returns a `<loc>` entry (guide URL, not gear-history)
3. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'hannes-grossmann'` returns `/guides/` and `/llms/guides/` entries
4. All 3 guide pages resolve HTTP 200 at `/guides/how-to-sound-like-[drummer]`
5. `/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-daniel-erlandsson.md` returns HTTP 200

## Done

All 3 missing SoundLike guide slugs appear in sitemap.xml for both the `/guides/` and `/llms/guides/` URL patterns.
title: SEO: Fix sitemap.js — 3 SoundLike guide pages live but missing from sitemap hardcoded array
